columns.extraction_plan: From Table 1, locate the "Overall" row and the "ADT Plus Docetaxel" section. Extract the value from the "Median OS (95% CI; months)" column: 57.6 (52.0 to 63.9). Report only the median: 57.6.
From Table 1, locate the "Overall" row and the "ADT Alone" section. Extract the value from the "Median OS (95% CI; months)" column: 47.2 (41.8 to 52.8). Report only the median: 47.2.
From Table 1, locate the "High volume" row and the "ADT Plus Docetaxel" section. Extract the value from the "Median OS (95% CI; months)" column: 51.2 (45.2 to 58.1). Report only the median: 51.2.
From Table 1, locate the "High volume" row and the "ADT Alone" section. Extract the value from the "Median OS (95% CI; months)" column: 34.4 (30.1 to 42.1). Report only the median: 34.4.
From Table 1, locate the "Low volume" row and the "ADT Plus Docetaxel" section. Extract the value from the "Median OS (95% CI; months)" column: 63.5 (58.3 to 78.5). Report only the median: 63.5.
From Table 1, locate the "Low volume" row and the "ADT Alone" section. The value in the "Median OS (95% CI; months)" column is "NR (59.8 to NR)". NR stands for "Not Reached". Report as NR.
